case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. CLAUDIA HINOJOSA AGUIRRE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, CLAUDIA HINOJOSA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00 SERVED NOV-08-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, CLAUDIA HINOJOSA
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, CLAUDIA HINOJOSA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, CLAUDIA HINOJOSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-06-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-06-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC REPRESENTED BY PRICILLA TOVAR, COLLECTION SPECIALTIST. DEFENDANT CALUDIA HINOJOSA AGUIRRE DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, CLAUDIA HINOJOSA
